header.title: Goals
header.description: What you want to achieve. For each goal the system finds and tests hypotheses from the knowledge base.

actions.suggest: Suggest goals from the knowledge base

suggestions.title: Recommended goals from the knowledge base
suggestions.description: Metrics that the uploaded works improve. Accept a suitable one in a single click — the create-goal form opens with the fields pre-filled.
suggestions.empty: No goals to suggest yet — upload more documents and the system will find what they improve.
suggestions.aiNote: Goals are suggested from the uploaded works — they are hints, not confirmed metrics. Review before creating.

list.archiveEmpty: This list is empty for now.

empty.title: Create your first goal
empty.description: Describe what to improve and how to measure it. The system will build hypotheses from your documents and show what every conclusion is based on.

card.generateHint: The system will study the knowledge-base documents and create testable hypotheses for this goal — they will appear on the Hypotheses page.
card.directionsHint: Hints from the intersection of your documents: which processes and properties affect this goal. They open in a side panel.
card.archiveHint: Remove from the working list without deleting anything

toast.directionSaved: Direction saved as a hypothesis draft
toast.directionSavedHint: You can find it on the Hypotheses page under the Drafts tab.

dialog.title: New goal
dialog.name: Title
dialog.namePlaceholder: e.g. Increase heat resistance of a Ni alloy at 800 °C
dialog.metric: Metric (how you will measure the result)
dialog.directionNote: The direction of change is inferred automatically. You can leave the exact target value empty if it is not known yet.

sheet.title: Directions from the knowledge graph
sheet.intro: The system links knowledge across documents: which process affects which property and how that helps the goal. Save a direction you like — it becomes a hypothesis draft on the Hypotheses page.
sheet.loading: Searching the knowledge graph for connections…
sheet.emptyDescription: The knowledge graph has too few connections for this goal yet. Upload more documents or generate hypotheses — the system will find directions at their intersection.
sheet.shownOf: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}}. The limit can be changed in system settings.
sheet.aiNote: Directions are suggested from connections in the knowledge base — they are R&D hints, not confirmed conclusions.

directionCard.savedHint: it will appear under the Drafts tab on the Hypotheses page

delete.title: Delete goal “{{title}}”?
delete.body: Hypotheses and directions created for this goal will remain — they simply become unlinked. This cannot be undone.

wizard.title: New goal and hypotheses
wizard.description: Describe the task in your own words and attach plant data — reports, flowsheets, regulations, constraints.
wizard.newGoal: New goal — I'll describe it in text
wizard.promptPlaceholder: E.g.: raise copper recovery at plant #2 from 82 to 86%. Budget up to 50M, no new flotation equipment, reagents may change.
wizard.promptExistingPlaceholder: E.g.: budget up to 50M, keep existing equipment, deadline — end of year.
wizard.promptHint: The system extracts the goal title, metric and constraints from your text.
wizard.addFiles: Add files or drop them here
wizard.dropHere: Drop the files to attach them to the goal
wizard.filesNote: Attached files become this goal's input data: problems and facts come from them, justification comes from the knowledge base.
wizard.editDescription: Your wording and attached data. Change the text or files — and regenerate hypotheses if needed.
wizard.editHint: If you change the text, the system re-extracts the title, metric and constraints.
